untranslatable_reason: Diamond Top pattern requires visual/structural pattern detection (converging trend lines forming diamond shape) which cannot be expressed using only the allowed indicators and operators. Volume shape classification (U-shaped vs dome-shaped vs random) requires pattern analysis not available in allowed indicator set. Measurement rule for price target from formation height (Figure 12.6) is not provided in source text. The signal fundamentally requires pattern recognition capabilities beyond point-in-time indicator values.
translation_notes: Successfully translated: SHORT direction, 69% success rate in bear markets, 17% average decline. Unable to translate: diamond shape detection, trend line convergence analysis, volume shape classification (U/dome vs random), and the specific measurement rule for profit targets. A proper implementation would require a custom pattern detector or multiple structural price conditions that cannot be adequately captured with available indicators.
